person.name: Maya

goals.text: Build a consistent creative practice without turning it into another source of pressure.
Find a small circle of people with whom creative work feels honest and energising.
Protect enough unstructured time to rest, travel slowly, and notice what is changing.

facts.text: Maya works as an independent editorial illustrator and is deciding which projects deserve a longer commitment.
She keeps a paper journal and prefers small weekly rituals to ambitious daily streaks.
The book is a birthday gift from a close friend who wants it to feel supportive rather than predictive.

person.giftMessage: Maya, I hope this book gives you a quiet place to return to whenever the year feels noisy. Keep what resonates, leave what does not, and make the year unmistakably yours.
